creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have successfully reproduced the bug and confirmed that it does not affect other MariaDB ports.  I spent quite some time trying to figure out why it happens, but have had no luck.  Everything I can think of to check looks the same in 10.0 and 10.1, which does not have this bug.

The patch looks fine, except that the correct target to modify is post-configure, and PORTREVISION needs to be bumped.
